name: json-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for JSON processing — format, validate, diff, convert, minify, query, analyze

tools.name: validate_json
tools.description: Validate JSON and return a detailed structure report

tools.name: diff_json
tools.description: Compare two JSON objects and show differences

tools.name: convert_json
tools.description: Convert JSON to another format: yaml, csv, xml, toml, or typescript

tools.name: minify_json
tools.description: Minify JSON by removing all whitespace. Returns minified output and compression stats.

tools.name: query_json
tools.description: Extract data from JSON using dot-notation path (e.g.

tools.name: analyze_json
tools.description: Analyze JSON structure: type, depth, key count, size, and structure tree
